title: Audio Central
description:
This central block can be used to control multiple audio block together.
The functions that can be used depend on the linked blocks such as Audio Player or Music Server Zone, and are set via their parameters.

inputs.description: Toggles zone on and off
Digital Input - Single pulse turns zone on
Digital Input - Single pulse turns zone off When playing a playlist, pressing Play will restart playback at the beginning of the title.
Increase volume by value set in parameter (Vsts). Double-click selects next favorite.
Decrease volume by value set in parameter (Vsts). Double-click turns off the player.
If the assigned Audio Players are set to different volumes, only the loudest players adopt the new value when the volume is changed; all other players follow accordingly but retain the volume ratio.
Trigger next source
Analogue Input Source This input is only visible in certain configurations.
Trigger stop playback When playing a playlist, pressing Play will restart playback at the beginning of the title.
Trigger shuffle This input is only visible in certain configurations.
Analogue Input - Value to indicate repeat state 0 = Off, 1 = Repeat Continuously, 2 = Repeat Once This input is only visible in certain configurations.
Zone is muted and switched off after duration specified in Ts The sleep timer is reset when switching off the zone (Off, Pause, Stop, R). This input is only visible in certain configurations.
Text to Speech input Maximum length 400 characters
Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.

Button 2 : Volume up; double-click starts playback or choses next favorite Button 5 : Volume down; double-click pauses playback Button 3: Double-click activates (2C); triple-click activates (3C); (Roff) = 0: pauses playback
Disables inputs V+, V-, V, Play, Pause, Prev, Next, Fav, Bell, Buzzer, T5, TTS, Cs, BTp when On. (e.g child lock, cleaning) Control via user interface is still possible.
As long as this input is active, any change in value at input (P) is ignored.
Plays alarm sound at volume set in parameter (Va).
Plays fire alarm sound at volume set in parameter (Va).
Plays doorbell sound at volume set in parameter (Vbell).
Starts alarm clock action as specified in the properties. If the action "Alarm Clock Chime" is selected, the alarm clock sound is played at the volume set in parameter (Vbuzzer).
Resets parameters and settings of the block to the default values as specified in the block preset.

Plays custom sound [filename] at volume [vol]. E.g. soundcheck.mp3:80 [filename]:[vol] Custom sounds have to be stored on the Audioserver’s SD card in the folder Event_Sounds! Only mp3 files are supported.

outputs.description: Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Ignore Room Off / House Off via T5 (button 3)

properties.description: All selected Music Server Zones and Audio Players can be controlled together.
